creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to bsduck from comment #0)
I've spent a little time investigating this but I don't see anything obvious.

 - Changing to the ports directory on the production Bugzilla instance and
   doing a make -V MAINTAINER returns the expected results.
 - The two ports are indeed in their Categories' Makefiles.  (This trap has
   already been encountered in the past :-)
 - The mailing list alias entry does not seem odd.
